channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Warns Iran Time Is Running Out for U.S. Strikes
item.description: President Trump told Axios that the clock is ticking for Iran, urging a better offer to avoid harder strikes.

item.title: Over 60 MAGA allies urge Trump to vet AI before release
item.description: More than 60 loyal allies of President Trump are calling for testing and approval of powerful AI models before they are released.

item.title: Trump abandons Dreamers despite past sympathy
item.description: President Trump speaks sympathetically about Dreamers, but his administration is targeting them for deportation.

item.title: Jewish lawmakers face surge in antisemitism
item.description: Antisemitism has become so prevalent in U.S. politics that hate speech is now part of daily life for Jewish lawmakers.
